summary: Tested portfolio backend (9 pytest tests) and frontend (Playwright UI flow). All backend endpoints work as specified; frontend loads cleanly, all sections render, navigation smooth-scroll works, contact form submits successfully with toast, HTML5 validation blocks empty submit. No console errors, no 4xx/5xx network failures.

minor.issue: On unexpected DB failure the handler raises HTTPException using `logger` which is defined AFTER the route (line 114 vs use at line 87). Currently unreachable in happy path, but if an insert ever fails before logger gets bound at import time, would raise NameError. Move logger init to top of file.

action_items: (Low priority) Move `logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)` above its first use in /app/backend/server.py (currently defined after the contact handler that references it in the except block).
critical_code_review_comments: logger used in /api/contact except-block is defined later in the file (line 114). Works at runtime because module finishes loading before requests arrive, but it's a code smell — initialize logging before routes.
EmailStr validation requires email-validator package; confirmed installed and 422 responses returned correctly for invalid emails.
MongoDB ObjectId is properly excluded via `{"_id": 0}` projections on both /api/contact GET and /api/status GET — verified in tests.
All key UI elements include data-testid attributes for testability (hero-section, hero-title, hero-download-cv, contact-form, contact-submit, contact-input-*, nav-link-*).
Sonner toast successfully renders 'MESSAGE RECEIVED. I'LL GET BACK TO YOU SOON.' after submit; form state is reset.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Test contact messages with TEST_ prefix were created via /api/contact during pytest run (not cleaned up; backend has no DELETE endpoint). Status checks with TEST_ prefix also created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend: 9 pytest tests in /app/backend/tests/test_portfolio_api.py covering /api/ root, /api/contact CRUD + validation, /api/status, and CV PDF accessibility. Run via `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v`. Frontend: portfolio is single-page with sections hero/about/experience/projects/skills/education/contact. Contact form posts to ${REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL}/api/contact with name/email/subject/message. Sonner toast shows on success; HTML5 required attributes block empty submits before JS toast.error fires (so the JS-side 'fill name, email and message' error toast is only reachable if browser validation is bypassed).
